calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Article Xvi, Section 1 Of The Declaration Of Establishment Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Pursuant To California Civil Code Section 4275
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ann Rankin, 51.653.8886 for Petitioner Topaz Townhomes ll Condominium Owners.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER TOPAZ WAY TOWNHOMES II CONDOMINIUM OWNERS' Notice Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Article Xvi, Section 1 Of The Declaration Of Establishment Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Pursuant To California Civil Code Section 4275 is granted. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
